message:
feat(views): make DegreeView and DiDegreeView callable like NetworkX

Add __call__ method to DegreeView and DiDegreeView so that:
- G.degree() returns the view itself
- G.degree(node) returns the int degree of that node
- G.degree([nodes]) returns a list of (node, degree) tuples

This fixes a parity gap where user code calling G.degree() or G.degree('a')
would raise TypeError. The weight parameter is accepted for API compatibility
but ignored (views are unweighted).

br-qoi1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -54,6 +54,9 @@ class DegreeView:
     def __iter__(self) -> Iterator[tuple[Any, int]]: ...
     def __getitem__(self, n: Any) -> int: ...
     def __bool__(self) -> bool: ...
+    def __call__(
+        self, nbunch: Any = None, weight: Optional[str] = None
+    ) -> Union["DegreeView", int, list[tuple[Any, int]]]: ...
 
 class AdjacencyView:
     def __len__(self) -> int: ...
@@ -94,6 +97,9 @@ class DiDegreeView:
     def __iter__(self) -> Iterator[tuple[Any, int]]: ...
     def __getitem__(self, n: Any) -> int: ...
     def __bool__(self) -> bool: ...
+    def __call__(
+        self, nbunch: Any = None, weight: Optional[str] = None
+    ) -> Union["DiDegreeView", int, list[tuple[Any, int]]]: ...
 
 class DiAdjacencyView:
     def __len__(self) -> int: ...
